name: Cherries to My Darling Topping
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Family Circle, vol. 105 no. 3, 2/1/93
Drain the filling into a sieve over a medium-sized bowl.
Use some of the sauce to sandwich cake layers together.
Stir together cherries and almond extract.
Spoon over the top of the cake layer, leaving a 1-inch border all around.
Surround with chocolate curls. Refrigerate for up to 1 hour before serving.
